mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_replies (post_id, user_id, content, status, created_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.post_id, r.user_id, r.content, r.status, r.handled_by, r.handled_at, r.created_at, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar FROM forum_replies r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.post_id, r.user_id, r.content, r.status, r.handled_by, r.handled_at, r.created_at, u.nickname AS author_nickname, u.avatar AS author_avatar FROM forum_replies r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.post_id = #{postId} AND r.status = #{status} ORDER BY r.created_at ASC, r.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_replies SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'normal'
